description: Style NoteThis T-shirt from puma comes equipped with moisture management technology to help you keep going strong in the gym and on the field while not having to worry about sweating. Stylish, this T-shirt also does well for the fashion conscious dresser.Product DetailsNavy blue T-shirt, has a round neckline, raglan short sleeves, piping around the arm holes and branding on the left chest Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash warm Tumble dry low Use cold ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
